history.title: Full current bank — 103 questions
changes: Day 2 Set B added (20 more Fluid Mechanics questions) — the bank now holds all 103 questions from your study series so far
End-to-end routine confirmed: dropping one day file + a manifest line flows straight to the live site

history.title: Day 1 added — Days 1-4 fully loaded
changes: Mathematics (Day 1, 18 questions) added — the bank now spans Days 1-4 (83 questions)
Demonstrates the daily routine in action: one new file (day01.json) + a manifest line, and Today, Bank, and Progress all updated with no code changes

history.title: Real questions Days 2-4 + daily-append structure
changes: 65 real questions now live: Fluid Mechanics I (20), Pipe Flow (21), Hydraulics (24)
New data model: one file per study day (data/days/dayNN.json) + manifest — adding a day auto-updates the whole app
Schedule dashboard fills in Days 2-4 as covered
Documented the FE engine → site daily routine (docs/engine-integration.md)

history.title: Real questions, schedule, equations panel
changes: Real exam questions now loading from the FE engine (Day 2: 20 Fluid Mechanics questions), tagged by day/topic
Full equations list (40+ relations, Days 1-4) in the searchable Handbook panel
Equations are hidden by default now — reveal them as a hint; the worked solution still unlocks step by step
Progress dashboard is schedule-aware: coverage vs. the full 21-day plan, updates as days are added
Numeric-entry questions supported (recall + self-grade)

history.title: Equation breakdowns, step-by-step, Handbook panel
changes: Relevant equations now shown up front on each question — solution stays hidden
Unlock the worked solution one step at a time
Searchable Handbook panel beside each question
Math renders properly now (KaTeX)
New Question Bank: browse, search, and filter every question by topic/mastery
Live version badge + this changelog

history.title: Progress, spaced repetition, settings
changes: Progress dashboard: per-section mastery, streak, days-to-exam, weakest sections
Leitner spaced repetition composes the daily set (due reviews + new)
Settings: daily size, new/review mix, reveal mode, SRS toggle, reset

history.title: Daily player
changes: Today's daily question set
Hide / reveal answers with self-grade
Daily streak

history.title: Site live
changes: pefeprep.com live on GitHub Pages with auto-deploy
